title: scaffold project structure
description: Create index.html, main.css skeleton, and all src/ module stubs so imports resolve.
notes: Created full project scaffold: index.html, styles/main.css, src/main.js, src/core/{state,events,tick,actions}.js, src/systems/{resources,research}.js, src/ui/{hud,buildingPanel,messageLog,researchPanel,tabs}.js, src/data/{buildings,units,techs}.js, src/utils/{logger,fmt}.js. Also created CLAUDE.md, roadmap.md, tasks.json, execution.log.

title: implement state, events, and tick loop
description: state.js (initial state), events.js (pub/sub), tick.js (setInterval 250ms emitting tick).
notes: state.js: full initial state with resources/rates/caps/buildings/units/techs/queues/messages. events.js: tiny pub/sub (on/off/emit) with Events constants. tick.js: 250ms interval loop with registerSystem(), startLoop(), stopLoop(). All systems registered in main.js.

title: implement resource system with production/consumption rates
description: resources.js system: on each tick, apply rates to state.resources. Rates derived from buildings and techs.
notes: Implemented as part of T001/T002 bootstrap. resources.js: recalcRates() sums building production/consumption with tech multipliers and unit upkeep; resourceTick() applies per-tick delta capped at caps; advances training queue. Integrated into tick loop via registerSystem().

title: implement building system (build, upgrade, demolish)
description: buildings data file, actions for build/upgrade/demolish, cost deduction, rate recalculation.
notes: data/buildings.js: 12 buildings with icon/cost/production/consumption/capBonus/requires. actions.js: buildBuilding() with 15%-per-level cost scaling, demolishBuilding(), trainUnit(). All trigger recalcRates() and emit events.

title: render resource HUD and building panel UI
description: UI components: resource bar at top, building cards panel, message log at bottom.
notes: hud.js: 6-resource HUD bar with icon/value/cap/rate, updates throttled to 1s. buildingPanel.js: grid of building cards with locked state, cost display, build/demolish buttons, click delegation. messageLog.js: scrolling event log, 15 visible entries. tabs.js: tab switcher for Buildings/Research/Log panels. researchPanel.js: tech tree with progress bar, prerequisite gating.

title: add unit data and training queue
description: units.js data, training queue system, UI panel for military.
notes: units.js: 4 units (soldier, archer, knight, mage) with cost/trainTicks/attack/defense/upkeep/requires. Training queue processed in resourceTick()._advanceTrainingQueue(). trainUnit() action in actions.js. Military panel (T007 session): militaryPanel.js added with army summary, training queue progress bar, and unit cards with cost/stat display and Train buttons.

title: implement map grid (20x20 tiles, fog of war)
description: Canvas-based 20x20 tile map with fog of war reveal on territory capture.
notes: systems/map.js: initMap() generates 20x20 tile grid with 5 terrain types (grass/forest/hills/river/mountain), player 3x3 capital at (10,10), ~20 enemy settlements. revealAround() expands fog on capture. territoryRateBonus() returns per-second rate bonuses for captured terrain (forest +wood, hills +stone, river +food, mountain +iron, grass +gold). ui/mapPanel.js: 480x480 canvas with terrain colours, player/enemy tints, fog-of-war, hover highlight for attackable tiles, click-to-attack. events.js: MAP_CHANGED, COMBAT added. state.js: map field added. index.html: Map and Military tabs added. main.js: initMap() called on boot/new-game, map saved/loaded.

title: basic combat resolution engine
description: Attack action, power calculation, outcome resolution, resource loot.
notes: systems/combat.js: attackTile(x,y) validates adjacency/fog/owner, sums unit attack values (with tech multipliers for tactics/steel/engineering), resolves combat probabilistically (win chance = power/(power+defense)), victory captures tile + grants loot + reveals neighbors, defeat loses 1 random unit. Defense scales with distance from capital (15 + dist*6). Log messages use combat-win/combat-loss types with matching CSS border colours.

title: territory capture and expansion mechanics
description: Capture adjacent tiles, apply territory bonuses to resource rates.
notes: Implemented as part of T007/T008. territoryRateBonus() in map.js returns rate bonuses integrated into recalcRates() in resources.js. Capturing tiles via attackTile() immediately triggers recalcRates() so bonuses apply. Map stats bar shows live territory/enemy/explored tile counts.

title: tech tree data and research system
description: techs.js data with prerequisites, research action, tick-based progress.
notes: Implemented as part of bootstrap. data/techs.js: 6 techs with cost/researchTicks/effectDesc/requires. systems/research.js: startResearch() validates prereqs and deducts cost; researchTick() advances queue and applies tech. ui/researchPanel.js: full tech tree UI with progress bar and gating.

title: save/load via localStorage (auto-save every 60s)
description: Serialize state to localStorage on interval, load on page open, manual save/load buttons.
notes: Implemented in main.js: _save() serializes state to localStorage key 'empireos-save'; _loadSave()/_applySave() restore on boot. Auto-save every 60s via setInterval. Manual Save button in title bar. New Game button clears save and reinits state. Version bumped to 2 to include map state.

title: tech effects applied to rates and unlock gates
description: Apply tech research bonuses to building multipliers, unit attack, and unlock requirements.
notes: Added 3 combat techs (tactics +25% attack, steel +50% attack, engineering +10% attack + unlocks Watchtower) to techs.js. Added tech requirements: knight requires metalworking, mage requires arcane, watchtower requires engineering. Wired warcraft -25% training speed in trainUnit() with totalTicks stored in queue entry for correct progress bar. buildingPanel now re-renders on TECH_CHANGED. militaryPanel reqStr shows tech icons/names via TECHS lookup. Army display shows tech-boosted combat power.

title: prestige / age advancement mechanic
description: Age system (Stone/Bronze/Iron/Medieval), unlock new buildings/units per age, prestige button.
notes: Created data/ages.js with 4 ages (Stone/Bronze/Iron/Medieval) each with productionMult (1.0/1.25/1.5/2.0), resource cost, and requirements (totalBuildings, totalUnits, territory, tech). Added state.age=0 to state.js. Added AGE_CHANGED event. Added advanceAge() to actions.js with full requirement checking + cost deduction. Applied age productionMult to building production in resources.js recalcRates(). Added age requirements to archeryRange (Bronze) and knight unit (Bronze). Building and military panels handle type:'age' in unlock logic and re-render on AGE_CHANGED. Research panel shows age section at top with current age, next age requirements checklist, cost, and Advance button. Age badge in title bar. Save/load includes age field (version 3).

title: random event system (raids, windfalls, disasters)
description: Time-triggered random events that affect resources, units, or territory.
notes: Created src/systems/randomEvents.js with 10 events (3 raids: bandit_raid/goblin_attack/pirates; 4 windfalls: merchant_caravan/bountiful_harvest/ore_vein/mana_surge; 3 disasters: drought/mine_collapse/plague). Disasters push temporary rate modifiers into state.randomEvents.activeModifiers, consumed by recalcRates() in resources.js. Events fire on a weighted-random 120–240s interval. initRandomEvents() wired in main.js boot; randomEventTick() registered as a tick system. state.randomEvents saved/loaded (save version 4). Log colours: raid=red, windfall=green, disaster=orange.

title: quest/objective system with rewards
description: Milestone objectives (first building, first unit, first capture, etc.) with resource rewards.
notes: Created src/systems/quests.js with 11 milestone quests (first_building/first_unit/five_buildings/first_research/first_capture/army_ten/ten_buildings/twenty_territory/age_bronze/age_iron/age_medieval). Each quest has a check() predicate, icon, and resource reward. initQuests() subscribes to BUILDING_CHANGED/UNIT_CHANGED/TECH_CHANGED/AGE_CHANGED/MAP_CHANGED. Created src/ui/questPanel.js rendering a card grid with completion progress bar; added 🏆 Quests tab in index.html. Added QUEST_COMPLETED event constant. state.quests saved/loaded. CSS: quest-card, quest-header, progress bar gold fill, log-entry--quest.

title: empire log / story panel
description: Narrative story panel showing empire history milestones.
notes: Created src/systems/story.js: initStory() registers dedup-safe milestone entries on GAME_STARTED/BUILDING_CHANGED/UNIT_CHANGED/TECH_CHANGED/AGE_CHANGED/MAP_CHANGED/QUEST_COMPLETED events. 16 milestone checks (founding, building x4, military x3, research x3, age x3, territory x4, quest per-completion). Created src/ui/storyPanel.js: vertical timeline with icon, title, desc, tick-to-time footer; type-based left border accent colours. Added state.story=[] to state.js (reset in initState). Included in save/load (version 5). Added '📖 History' tab in index.html. Wired initStory+initStoryPanel in main.js. Added full CSS: .story-header, .story-timeline (::before vertical line), .story-entry (icon on line, body), type-accent border colours.

title: settings panel (speed, sound toggle)
description: Settings tab with game speed slider (0.5×/1×/2×/4×) and placeholder sound toggle.
notes: Extended src/core/tick.js: added _speedMult module var; setTickSpeed(mult) restarts interval at TICK_MS/mult; getTickSpeed() returns current mult; startLoop uses _speedMult so loops started after a speed change use the right interval. Created src/ui/settingsPanel.js: speed button row (½×/1×/2×/4×) with active highlight, disabled sound checkbox with 'Coming soon' badge, About section. Added '⚙️ Settings' tab in index.html. Wired initSettingsPanel in main.js. Added full CSS in main.css: .settings-section, .speed-buttons, .btn--speed, .btn--speed-active, .settings-toggle.

title: visual polish — CSS animations, transitions
description: Resource gain/loss flash, building card pop-in, combat flash on map tiles.

title: responsive layout for mobile
description: Map canvas scales down, HUD wraps gracefully, panels usable on 375px width.

title: diplomacy system (alliances, trade routes)
description: AI empires, alliance/war status, trade route resource exchange per tick.

title: seasons cycle affecting resource rates
description: 4-season cycle (90s each), rate modifiers per season per resource.

title: hero unit with special abilities
description: Hero unit with unique abilities (battle cry, inspire, siege), recruit once per game.

title: leaderboard (localStorage high scores)
description: Track best territory count and gold earned per session, display top 5.

title: export/import save as JSON string
description: Encode state as base64 JSON, provide copy/paste import modal.
